products.name: Multi Grid Lot EA
products.desc:
# 📘 Multi Grid EA — Candle Close + Basket Trailing System

## Overview

Multi Grid EA is a MetaTrader 5 Expert Advisor that combines candle confirmation, smart grid trading, and basket profit protection.

The EA uses:

✅ Candle close entries
✅ Multi-level grid system
✅ Basket break-even protection
✅ Dynamic trailing stop

---

## Entry Logic

The EA opens the first trade after candle close:

🟢 Bullish candle → BUY
🔴 Bearish candle → SELL

This avoids random tick-based entries and improves trade filtering.

---

## Grid System

After the first trade, the EA activates up to 40 grid levels.

Each level controls:

• Lot size
• Distance between trades
• Repeat count

New trades open only when:

✅ New candle closes
✅ Required grid distance is reached

---

## Basket Management

All trades are managed as one basket.

The EA calculates:

• Average entry price
• Total volume
• Basket profit

---

## Basket Trailing Protection

When basket profit reaches the set level:

1. SL moves to break even
2. Trailing stop starts
3. Profit is locked as price moves

The EA does not use fixed TP — it lets profits run while protecting gains.

---

## Main Features

✅ 40-Level Grid Trading
✅ Candle-Based Confirmation
✅ Trend & Reverse Modes
✅ Smart Risk Control
✅ Automatic Profit Locking
✅ Reduced Overtrading

---

## Recommended For

• Forex pairs
• Range markets
• Swing trading
• Moderate volatility

⚠️ Use proper lot sizing and risk management with any grid strategy.

**Multi Grid EA provides controlled grid entries with automatic basket protection and profit management.**
